case_title: DEAN JOHNNIE WALKER VS. MARCELINO MAURICIO MACHORRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALKER, DEAN JOHNNIE AS TO DEFENDANT MACHORRO, MARCELINO MAURICIO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-24-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-24-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-01-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-24-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-06-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100006613), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALKER, DEAN JOHNNIE SERVED OCT-01-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACHORRO, MARCELINO MAURICIO

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100013954)
